title: Create Board where Epic is group name and all tasks related to epic are listed within group

posts.author: JAREDofBatch (Jared)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all,

Sorry if this is an easy thing to set up but I am new to Monday.
I have used the ‘Product development / Scrum Software Development’ template as a starting point and done some minor tweaks.
Now I want to create a new board that has each Epic as a Group title and all task assigned to that Epic within the group.

The main purpose of this is so my managers (not technical) can have a simple place to see all tasks our engineering team have completed, are completing or are planning under each epic.

Cheers
